book.title: Shama'il Muhammadiyah
book.author: Imam Tirmidhi
book.introduction: Sayyidina Rasoolullah Performing Nawaafil At Home

translation.text: "I asked Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace) about performing the ritual prayer in my home, and performing it in the mosque." He said: “You may notice how near my home is to the mosque. I prefer praying at home over praying in the mosque, except in the case of a prescribed ritual prayer.”

chapter.title: Sayyidina Rasoolullah Performing Nawaafil At Home
